title: User can log in with email and password
As a user I want to manage my entire profile including all personal settings and notification preferences and billing details all in one place
Password reset flow
acceptance_criteria: Given a registered user, when they click 'Forgot password' and enter their email, then they receive a reset link within 2 minutes. Given expired link, when clicked, then an error message is shown.

title: Export data to CSV
acceptance_criteria: Given user on data page, when they click Export, then a CSV file is downloaded within 3 seconds with all visible columns.

title: Mobile responsive design for all pages
Two-factor authentication setup and management including SMS TOTP backup codes and account recovery flows
